content: As stated by bak u can just type vuln into it to see. I also have a doc here that just lists all the weak vuln, enlightens, where it sources from ie exalt/card, and turn length all in one place but skey db does let you search just about anything https://docs.google.com/document/d/1j-J1wxWTQTduK3VIPW-xuc0Vh3rmEEGO7mDeMvkzG5Y/edit?usp=drivesdk

embeds.title: Morimens Weak/Vuln/Status
embeds.description: Pink text means the card is retained *Indicates there will be a note for that character +Indicated multiple turns of effect   Exalts tend to be more consistent sources of application since you can directly choose when to apply the buff/debuff but less frequent than cards as you can cycle through ...
